on_screen_text:
Arjun: Priya.. innaiki Neha enna reject pannitta [Priya.. today Neha rejected me]
Arjun: Naan Ava kita "I am loving you since long time" apdinu sonnen [I told her "I am loving you since long time"]
Arjun: Ava sirichukittr "modhalla English kathuko" apdinu solita [She laughed and said "first learn English"]
Arjun: Friends ellarum anga irundhanga ... Semma insult aayiduchi [All friends were there ... huge insult]
Priya: Arjun, kavalai padadha! [Arjun, don't worry!]
Priya: Munnadi naanum unna maadhiri dhaan English pesinen [Earlier I also spoke English like you]
Priya: Aana MySivi app use pannadhuku appram ellamae maariduchi [But after using MySivi app, everything changed]
Arjun: MySivi ya??? [MySivi???]
Priya: Aama! Inga AI teacher Arya irukkanga [Yes! Here AI teacher Arya is there]
Priya: Daily just 15 minutes avanga kitta pesu, oru friend maadhiri [Daily just 15 minutes talk to her, like a friend]
Priya: Edhavadhu mistake pannalum avanga judge panna maattanga, correct mattum dhaan pannuvanga [Even if you make mistakes, they won't judge, they will only correct]
Arjun: Apo innum hope iruka??? [So is there still hope???]
Priya: Kandippa! [Definitely!]
Priya: Oru rendu vaaram practice pannu...un English avlo improve aagum, Neha-vae impress aagiduva [Practice for two weeks... your English will improve so much, Neha herself will be impressed]
Arjun: Aana idhu romba expensive ah irukumae??? [But this must be very expensive???]
Priya: Illa, verum oru roopa dhaan! [No, just one rupee!]
Arjun: Wow!!
Arjun: Naan ippovae download panren. [I will download it right now.]
Arjun: Rendu vaaram kazhichi Neha va prefect English la propose panuven. [After two weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English.]
Priya: All the best! MySivi download panni start pannu [All the best! Download MySivi and start]
summary: A simulated WhatsApp chat where a man shares his embarrassment over being rejected due to poor English. His friend recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher, 15-minute daily practice, and a 1-rupee price. He decides to download the app to improve his English and win her back.
